testName: Rate limiter allows burst above configured threshold
summary: The token bucket implementation does not account for concurrent requests arriving within the same millisecond window, allowing 2-3x the configured rate limit during traffic spikes.
suggestedFix: Add atomic increment using Redis MULTI/EXEC or Lua script to prevent race conditions in the token decrement path.

testName: Redis connection timeout causes 500 instead of fallback
summary: When Redis is unreachable, the rate limiter throws an unhandled exception instead of falling back to in-memory limiting or allowing the request through.
suggestedFix: Wrap Redis calls in try/catch with a configurable fallback strategy (allow, deny, or in-memory limit).
